## TRAINING CONTEXT

### Schedule & Availability
- Desired training frequency: 4

### Experience
- Level: Intermediate
- Details: 2 years serious training. Alpine ski racer training year-round. Off-season strength focus, in-season maintenance. Prefers explosive movements, plyometrics, heavy single-leg work. Mon/Tue/Thu/Sat mornings, 60-75 min.

### Equipment & Environment
- Training location: hybrid
- Setup details: Full commercial gym access plus some home equipment for quick sessions
- Available equipment: barbells, Dumbbells, machines, plyo_boxes

### Constraints
- Previous MCL sprain (right knee), manages with prehab and stability work.

reference.response:
### IDENTITY
- **Name:** Mia Thompson  
- **Age:** 30  
- **Gender:** Female  
- **Experience level:** **Intermediate** — 2 years consistent/serious strength training; trains year-round for alpine ski racing (off-season build, in-season maintain).

---

### GOALS
- **Primary goal(s):** **Performance (alpine ski racing, masters/amateur)** — off-season emphasis (next ~8 months) on:
  - Leg power & explosive strength (jumping/plyometrics, Olympic-derivative work if used)
  - Single-leg strength (heavy unilateral patterns)
  - Knee/hip stability and injury prevention (especially right knee)
  - Core strength (anti-rotation/anti-extension; trunk stiffness under load)
- **Secondary goals:**
  - Maintain training consistency during off-season build
  - Improve movement quality and resilience for in-season demands (high eccentric loads, edge control)
- **Target events/deadlines:** Ski season begins in **~8 months (as of 2026-02-27)**

---

## TRAINING CONTEXT

### Schedule & Availability
- **Available training days:** **Mon / Tue / Thu / Sat**
- **Desired training frequency:** **4 sessions/week** (matches available days)
- **Session duration:** **60–75 minutes**
- **Time windows:** **Mornings** (exact time not specified)
- **Blocked days:** Wed/Fri/Sun (not specified why)

### Equipment & Environment
- **Training location:** **Hybrid** (commercial gym + home for quick sessions)
- **Commercial gym access:** Barbells, dumbbells, machines, plyo boxes (full gym setup implied)
- **Home equipment:** Some equipment available (not yet specified: exact items/loads)

### Constraints
- **[ACTIVE]** Previous right knee **MCL sprain** — currently managed with prehab/stability work; monitor valgus collapse/tibial rotation tolerance and symptom response, especially with cutting/jumping and deep knee flexion under load (**since 2026-02-27**, history; not marked resolved because ongoing management).

### Preferences
- **Likes / tends to prioritize:** Explosive movements, plyometrics, heavy single-leg work
- **Training style:** Off-season strength focus; in-season maintenance approach
- **Focus areas:** Single-leg strength, stability, injury prevention, core strength, explosive power

---

## METRICS
*(No objective performance metrics provided yet — add when available. Priority set to ski-performance-relevant strength/power first.)*

### Strength (as of 2026-02-27)
- **Not provided yet:** Key lifts/unilateral benchmarks (e.g., front squat/back squat, trap bar deadlift, split squat/Bulgarian split squat, RDL, step-up), and any rep/weight data.

### Endurance (as of 2026-02-27)
- Not provided / not prioritized (no current conditioning metrics supplied).

### Movement Quality (as of 2026-02-27)
- **Knee status:** History of right MCL sprain; currently able to train with prehab/stability (pain/instability levels not specified).
- **Not provided yet:** Single-leg squat quality, hop/landing mechanics, ankle dorsiflexion, hip IR/ER, trunk control tests.

### Body Composition (as of 2026-02-27)
- Not provided (weight, BF%, or trend not supplied).

---

## LOG
## 2026-02-27 — Profile created/updated (ski performance off-season focus)
- Set primary goal to **alpine ski racing performance** with **8-month off-season build** emphasis on leg power, stability, injury prevention, core strength, explosive power, and heavy single-leg strength.
- Confirmed training availability: **4x/week (Mon/Tue/Thu/Sat mornings), 60–75 min**.
- Equipment context added: **hybrid** training with **full commercial gym access** + unspecified home equipment.
- Constraint added: **[ACTIVE] prior right MCL sprain**, managed with prehab/stability work.

---  

If you share any current benchmarks (e.g., split squat 5RM per leg, trap bar deadlift, jump height/broad jump, or recent in-season notes), I’ll populate METRICS with dated entries for tracking.
